Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naru Huan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor's support will arrive once a winner is made clear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's forces would cripple an aggressor in a day if war were declared openly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is a figure Cassias believes will not allow certain actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor holds the title to the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Huan is the Emperor and has reached the Overlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Huan is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Naru Huan could have assigned Eithan as the temporary guardian of the western territories while the Jai dissolved into infighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Naru Huan uses wind madra to cushion a glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor received a dream tablet from an Underlord demanding punishment for Eithan's actions in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is drinking wine.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei intends to bring word of the situation to the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is gathering his Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Huan is the Patriarch of the Naru clan and the sole leader of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Naru Huan is the Emperor of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn serve in the name of the Emperor.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya is the Blackflame Emperor's little sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Huan is Emperor Naru the Second.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor ordered that operations follow Naru Gwei's orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Huan nodded after thinking for a moment.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan may work for the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — There was a last Blackflame Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The expedition was fueled by the Emperor’s power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor wore green sacred artist's robes and had wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor possesses a Blackflame sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor of the Blackflame Empire possesses emerald wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Emperor Naru Huan has emerald wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Huan is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Emperor Naru Huan's weapon is a long, straight-bladed sword made of black glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor held a celebratory feast.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Huan is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Huan holds the title of Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya advises Lindon to present himself to the Emperor upon returning to the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Emperor was discussed for execution due to dereliction of duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Huan intends to put Eithan to work.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Huan is aboard the Emperor's cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor is from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackflame Emperor is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Huan remained hovering in midair after greeting them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Huan is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Huan's sister sent him word from the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Huan is practiced in fighting against Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Huan possesses several sacred weapons designed for fighting Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon did not tell the Emperor about his combat advantages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Emperor issued an order for Lowgold or higher sacred artists to report to the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Emperor Naru Huan is involved in an Overlord-level battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor can release blasts of wind that tear apart trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan has wide emerald wings.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
